prompts.name: Neon Street
prompts.text: Place the scene on a rainy neon-lit street with glowing signs, reflective pavement, dense urban detail, and a stylish cyberpunk atmosphere.

prompts.name: Back Alley
prompts.text: Create a cyberpunk back alley with pipes, cables, graffiti, vending machines, neon spill light, and gritty urban texture.

prompts.name: Rooftop
prompts.text: Place the subject on a high rooftop overlooking a neon megacity with wind, distant lights, and dramatic vertical scale.

prompts.name: Night Market
prompts.text: Create a crowded cyberpunk night market with food stalls, holographic ads, colorful umbrellas, and glowing atmospheric detail.

prompts.name: Cybernetic Augments
prompts.text: Add tasteful cybernetic augment details such as glowing interface lines, mechanical limbs, or subtle facial tech while keeping the design elegant.

prompts.name: Hacker Room
prompts.text: Place the scene in a cluttered hacker room filled with monitors, cables, dim neon light, keyboards, and digital atmosphere.

prompts.name: Megacity
prompts.text: Create a dense cyberpunk megacity with towering skyscrapers, vertical layers, traffic lights, fog, and luminous advertising.

prompts.name: Subway Station
prompts.text: Set the scene in a futuristic underground subway station with neon panels, wet tiles, crowds, and gritty detail.

prompts.name: Neon Club
prompts.text: Place the subject in a neon club with saturated colored lights, haze, reflective surfaces, and energetic nightlife mood.

prompts.name: Cyberpunk Raincoat
prompts.text: Dress the subject in a sleek cyberpunk raincoat with glossy material, sharp silhouette, and neon reflections.

prompts.name: Street Vendor Stall
prompts.text: Create a small street vendor stall with steam, lanterns, holographic signs, and lively night-city texture.

prompts.name: Surveillance Drone
prompts.text: Add a hovering surveillance drone with glowing sensors, compact mechanical design, and believable lighting interaction.

prompts.name: Retro Arcade
prompts.text: Place the scene in a cyberpunk arcade with old machines, neon screens, reflective floors, and nostalgic futuristic energy.

prompts.name: Skybridge
prompts.text: Set the scene on a glass skybridge high above a neon city, with glowing traffic far below and strong perspective depth.

prompts.name: Tiny Tech Apartment
prompts.text: Create a cramped cyberpunk apartment with glowing monitors, cluttered tech, city lights through windows, and lived-in detail.
